task_completion.description: Import the survey points file into TopoCal
task_completion.visual_evidence: TopoCal import dialog open, showing the selection of 'survey_points.txt' or specifying the format P,X,Y,Z,D.

task_completion.description: Verify points are loaded into the TopoCal workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list of points or a graphical representation of the survey points visible within the TopoCal application interface.

task_completion.description: Renumber the points sequentially starting from 1001
task_completion.visual_evidence: A renumbering dialog or tool open in TopoCal with the starting number set to 1001, or the point list updated to show point numbers starting at 1001.

task_completion.description: Export the renumbered points to a new text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: TopoCal export dialog open, showing the destination path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\renumbered_points.txt' and the format PointNumber, X, Y, Z, Description.
A 'Save As' dialog in TopoCal or the TopoCal main window title bar showing a saved project name instead of 'Untitled'.

integrity.description: The agent used the TopoCal graphical user interface to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with TopoCal menus, dialogs, and workspace, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually edit or create the text files using a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The renumbering and exporting processes are handled by TopoCal's built-in functions, not by opening Notepad or another text editor to manually type or paste the 45 points.

integrity.description: The export was performed through TopoCal
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog shown belongs to the TopoCal application, confirming the software generated the output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is C:\Users\Docker\Documents\renumbered_points.txt. The renumbered points must start sequentially at 1001, and there should be exactly 45 points in total.
